account_suspended.description: Your account has been temporarily suspended as a security measure due to a {bold_start}violation of our terms of service{bold_end}.

appeal_modal.title: Appeal Process
appeal_modal.subtitle: If you believe this is a mistake, you can follow these steps.
appeal_modal.step1_desc: Send an email to support with your Case ID.
appeal_modal.step2_desc: Our team will review your account activity manually.
appeal_modal.step3_desc: You will be notified via email about the final decision.
appeal_modal.note: Note: Repeated violations may lead to permanent deletion.

guidelines_modal.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines_modal.content:
1. Be Respectful: No harassment or hate speech.
2. No Spam: Do not post repetitive content.
3. Authentic Content: Share only your own creations.
4. Safety First: No harmful or dangerous content.

terms_modal.title: Terms of Service
terms_modal.content: By using Cookrange, you agree to our terms. Access to the service is a privilege, not a right. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate our community standards or pose a security risk. Please review the full terms on our website.

generic_error.description: An unexpected error occurred in the application. Please try again later or contact our support team.

troubleshoot_modal.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshoot_modal.subtitle: Common solutions for this error
troubleshoot_modal.step4: Check for app updates in the store.
troubleshoot_modal.step5: If the issue persists, contact support with the Error Code.

camera.title: Camera Access
camera.rationale: Cookrange needs camera access to scan food and barcodes for nutrition logging.

photos.title: Photo Library
photos.rationale: Cookrange needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures and post images.

location.title: Location Access
location.rationale: Cookrange needs your location to verify you're at the gym for GPS check-in.

notifications.title: Stay on Track
notifications.rationale: Enable notifications to get streak reminders, friend activity updates, and personalized coaching tips.

denied.title: Permission Required
denied.message: Please enable this permission in Settings to use this feature.

admin.reject_notes_hint: Explain why the application was rejected...
admin.reports_empty_msg: All reports have been reviewed. The community is clean!
admin.reports_remove_msg: This will permanently delete the {type} and cannot be undone.
admin.broadcast_empty_msg: Compose a push notification to send to your users.
admin.force_logout_done: Session cleared. User will be logged out on next action.
admin.dishes_reseed_body: Re-runs the seeder for missing dishes. Existing dishes are not overwritten.

intro.page1_subtitle: Get a personalized weekly meal plan generated by AI based on your goals, allergies, and food preferences.
intro.page2_subtitle: Log your daily calories, macros, and weight. Watch your nutrition progress in real time.
intro.page3_subtitle: Connect with others, share progress, join challenges, and climb the leaderboard together.
intro.page4_subtitle: Find gyms near you, get matched with a certified coach, and unlock your full potential.
intro.page5_subtitle: See your 30, 60, and 90-day transformation forecast powered by AI. Know your goal date before you start.

whats_new.title: What's New
whats_new.item1_body: New users now see a beautiful walkthrough before setting up their profile.
whats_new.item2_body: Admins get a real-time overview of pending applications and open reports.
whats_new.item3_body: Reported posts and comments can now be reviewed and actioned in the admin panel.
whats_new.item4_body: AI surfaces now have branded loading, empty, and limit-reached states throughout the app.
whats_new.item5_body: The program marketplace now seeds demo content so new users see life from day one.

coachmarks.ring_body: This ring tracks your daily calorie goal. Tap to log food.
coachmarks.scan_body: Tap the camera icon to analyze any meal with AI.
coachmarks.actions_body: Hold or tap the button to access shortcuts.

discover.subtitle: Explore the Cookrange ecosystem
discover.premium_subtitle: Go Premium to access the full ecosystem
